query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT eo.subscriberEmail) AS iscritti_con_apertura,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active') AS totale_attivi,
  ROUND(
    COUNT(DISTINCT eo.subscriberEmail) * 100.0 / 
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers WHERE status = 'active'), 
    1
  ) AS percentuale_open_rate
FROM email_opens eo
INNER JOIN subscribers s ON s.email = eo.subscriberEmail
WHERE s.status = 'active';
